item: Fresh clone from graphrefly/graphrefly-stack installs and all gates succeed.
Live GPT-5.6 planning and selective replan work with a local key, and deterministic fixture replay works without one.
CLI installation, supported platforms, local UI launch, and a direct judging path are documented.
Git history distinguishes substantive work after 2026-07-13 and the README distinguishes pre-existing GraphReFly from GraphReFly Stack Build Week work.
Final bundle records exact model and effort, commit and blueprint witnesses, provider and policy versions, schema and prompt versions, artifact hashes, and all semantic-validity case verdicts.
Primary implementation task has a /feedback Session ID.
Developer Tools category and GraphReFly Stack project description are final.
Public YouTube demo is under three minutes, includes voiceover, and explains Codex and GPT-5.6 usage.
Repository URL, setup, sample stack data, no-key replay, and judging-path instructions are complete without asking judges for credentials.
Official rules are rechecked and the Devpost entry is final before BW-D1.
